title: Reims, Grand Est — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Reims, Grand Est: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Reims is a city in Grand Est with a population of 183,000. The coronation city of French kings, with a magnificent Gothic cathedral and the heart of the Champagne wine region.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
